description: A power plant owner needs to develop a bid strategy to sell capacity from their generator in the ISO's forward capacity auction.

nodes.task_description: Determine the true cost of the generator being available (Cost of New Entry - CONE) to inform the bid floor.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst calculates the minimum acceptable price for the capacity.

nodes.task_description: Analyze past capacity auction clearing prices and the supply/demand balance for the upcoming auction.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst forecasts the likely clearing price for the auction.

nodes.task_description: Formulate and submit a bid into the capacity auction platform.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the capacity offer.
